languages.text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
В начале хода востанавливает 10% щита самой поврежденной стороны

В начале хода востанавливает 10% щита самой поврежденной стороны

languages.text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g}'s turn, the most {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damaged{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} restores 10% of its strength.

traits.locale_text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the flagship's turn, restores 10% shield strength on the most damaged side.

Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g}'s turn, the most {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damaged{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} restores 10% of its strength.

Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g}'s turn, the most {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damaged{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} restores 10% of its strength.

languages.text:
Пластины пластали защищают судно от повреждений, нейтрализуя по 7 {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}урона{/g} с каждой стороны.
В начале каждого хода {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}флагмана{/g} самый {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}поврежденный{/g} его {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}сектор щитов{/g} восстанавливает 10% от максимального заряда.
languages.original_text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.

traits.locale_text:
Пластины пластали защищают судно от повреждений, нейтрализуя по 7 {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}урона{/g} с каждой стороны.
В начале каждого хода {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}флагмана{/g} самый поврежденный сектор его {g|Encyclopedia:VoidshipShieldsGlossary}щитов{/g} восстанавливает 10% от максимального заряда.

Пластины пластали защищают судно от повреждений, нейтрализуя по 7 {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}урона{/g} с каждой стороны.
В начале каждого хода {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}флагмана{/g} самый поврежденный сектор его {g|Encyclopedia:VoidshipShieldsGlossary}щитов{/g} восстанавливает 10% от максимального заряда.

languages.text:
Plaststahl-Platten schützen das Raumschiff und wehren auf jeder Seite 7 Punkte {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} ab.
Zu Beginn des Zuges des {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}Flaggschiffs{/g} regeneriert der am stärksten {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}beschädigte{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}Schildsektor{/g} 10 % seiner Stärke.
languages.original_text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g}'s turn, the most {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damaged{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} restores 10% of its strength.

traits.locale_text:
Plaststahl-Platten schützen das Raumschiff und wehren auf jeder Seite 7 Punkte {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} ab.
Zu Beginn des Zuges des {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}Flaggschiffs{/g} regeneriert der am stärksten {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}beschädigte{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}Schildsektor{/g} 10 % seiner Stärke.

languages.text:
Las placas de plastiacero protegen la nave contra el daño: niegan 7 puntos de {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}daño{/g} a cada lado.
Al inicio del turno de la {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}nave insignia{/g}, el {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}sector de escudo{/g} más {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}dañado{/g} recupera un 10 % de su fuerza.
languages.original_text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.

Al inicio del turno de la {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}nave insignia{/g}, el {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}sector de escudo{/g} más {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}dañado{/g} recupera un 10 % de su fuerza.

languages.text:
塑钢船板可保护舰船免受伤害，每侧可抵消7点{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}伤害{/g}。
{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}旗舰{/g}回合开始时，{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}受损{/g}最严重的{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}护盾区域{/g}恢复10%的强度。
languages.original_text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g}'s turn, the most {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damaged{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} restores 10% of its strength.

traits.locale_text:
塑钢船板可保护舰船免受伤害，每侧可抵消7点{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}伤害{/g}。
{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}旗舰{/g}回合开始时，{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}受损{/g}最严重的{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}护盾区域{/g}恢复10%的强度。

languages.text:
Plasçelik plakalar, tüm taraflarda 7'şer puanlık {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}hasarı{/g} yadsıyarak gemiyi zarar görmekten korur.
{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}Sancak gemisinin{/g} turunun başlangıcında en {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}hasarlı{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}kalkan sektörü{/g}, kuvvetinin %10'unu geri kazanır.
languages.original_text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g}'s turn, the most {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damaged{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} restores 10% of its strength.

Plasçelik plakalar, tüm taraflarda 7'şer puanlık {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}hasarı{/g} yadsıyarak gemiyi zarar görmekten korur.
{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}Sancak gemisinin{/g} turunun başlangıcında en {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}hasarlı{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}kalkan sektörü{/g}, kuvvetinin %10'unu geri kazanır.

languages.text:
Les plaques de plastacier protègent le vaisseau, annulant 7 points de {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de chaque côté.
Au début du tour du {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}vaisseau amiral{/g}, la puissance du {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}secteur du bouclier{/g} le plus {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}endommagé{/g} est restaurée de 10 %.
languages.original_text:
Plasteel plates protect the vessel from harm, negating 7 points of {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damage{/g} on each side.
At the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g}'s turn, the most {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}damaged{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}shield sector{/g} restores 10% of its strength.

traits.locale_text:
Les plaques de plastacier protègent le vaisseau, annulant 7 points de {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de chaque côté.
Au début du tour du {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}vaisseau amiral{/g}, la puissance du {g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}secteur du bouclier{/g} le plus {g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}endommagé{/g} est restaurée de 10 %.

languages.text:
プラステール製の装甲板が船体を保護し、両舷の{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を7ポイント軽減する。
{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}旗艦{/g}のターン開始時に、最も{g|Encyclopedia:SpaceBattleDamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を受けた{g|Encyclopedia:ShieldSectorSpace}シールドセクター{/g}が10%の強度を回復する。
